title: Admissions Open for Academic Year 2026-27
content: Applications are invited for UG and PG programs. Visit the admission portal to apply online.

title: Semester Examination Schedule Published
content: The end-semester examinations for all departments will commence from May 15, 2026.

title: Annual Sports Meet 2026
content: Join us for the annual sports meet on April 25th at the college grounds.

title: Summer Internship Workshop
content: A special workshop on securing summer internships will be held in the auditorium.

title: Eid-ul-Fitr Holiday Notice
content: The college will remain closed on the occasion of Eid-ul-Fitr.
